summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SP630E RGBWW LED Controller frontend functionality with focus on protocol integration and new animation effects. All 16 requested features tested successfully. Backend APIs confirmed working 100% (10/10). Frontend demo mode fully functional with all 5 channel sliders, 12 PWM animation effects, preset management, schedule creation, and BLE protocol information display.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (GET /api/) - 100% working
Backend preset APIs (POST/GET/DELETE/PUT) - 100% working
Backend schedule APIs (POST/GET/DELETE/PUT) - 100% working
Frontend connection page loads with 'CİHAZ ARA' scan button
Frontend protocol info displays Service UUID (0000ffe0) and Write UUID (0000ffe1)
Frontend protocol tags show SP630E, RGBCCT, 5CH PWM correctly
Frontend demo mode button enters control panel successfully
Frontend 5 channel sliders work with real-time preview (KIRMIZI, YEŞİL, MAVİ, SICAK BEYAZ, SOĞUK BEYAZ)
Frontend HEPSİ AÇ button sets all channels to 100%
Frontend HEPSİ KAPAT button sets all channels to 0%
Frontend color preview panel updates dynamically with mixed colors
Frontend KOMUTU GÖNDER button works in demo mode
Frontend tabs navigation works (control, presets, schedule, animation, settings)
Frontend preset save form works (name input, save button)
Frontend preset list loads from backend with color previews
Frontend preset load/favorite/delete buttons work end-to-end
Frontend schedule creation form works (name, time, day selection)
Frontend animation panel shows 12 PWM effects with speed slider
Frontend animation effects activate successfully in demo mode
Frontend settings tab shows device info (SP630E Demo, demo-device)
Frontend settings tab displays BLE protocol UUIDs and command format correctly
